## Type of Change

- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring Update to existing workflow
- [ ] ♻️ New reusable workflow
- [ ] 🧩 New composite action
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (changes inputs/outputs/secrets interface)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards ([AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md))
- [ ] All workflow YAML files have SPDX headers
- [ ] Inputs/outputs are documented with `description` fields
- [ ] Secrets have `required: true/false` set correctly
- [ ] Defaults are sensible for most consumers
- [ ] Tested against a sample consumer repo (link the run below)
- [ ] `examples/` updated if new inputs were added
- [ ] `docs/usage.md` updated if the interface changed
